race.comment: VOYNICHESE (12) started ($1.90 fav) on debut with a narrow head second over 1100m at Bathurst. Has the upside to put these away despite drawing out. SMOKIN'ANNIVERSARY (11) Royal Meeting filly from Veuve Girl on debut for the Kym Davison yard. Looked sharp with a recent trial win over 900m here. Good draw and claim will assist her chances. Leading player. CHEF'S KISS (1) chipped away late from the outside gate at his second race start when sixth over 1200m at Moruya in a Super Maiden. Good gate today and should handle the conditions. Each way. DISTANT STRIPES (4) is struggling to draw a decent gate and today is no different. Assess on the good third three-back when third in a Super Maiden at Wagga. Each-way.
